reviews.name: Elisabeth
reviews.headline: It was good experience
reviews.pros: The room was of sufficient size, the pool was great, and the staff were really helpful and provided great customer service. The cafe by the pool offers great food!!
reviews.cons: The breakfast. It's a choice from 2 same breakfast items every day, not worth $20. 1 hot, 1 cold drink. 1 savory muffin and 1 sweet pastry. If I had known this, I would not have opted for breakfast.

reviews.name: Lindsey Rains
reviews.pros: The room and view were beautiful, super quiet, and truly felt like a home away from home. TThe staff was exceptionally kind and attentive. Every single room in the suite felt spacious an luxurious.
reviews.cons: The sofa bed was really uncomfortable to sleep on. The main bed was super comfortable so I was surprised that the sofa bed was so uncomfortable. Would not recommend a King Suite for 2 people who wouldn't normally share a bed.

reviews.name: Vanessa
reviews.headline: Good value and nice space.
reviews.pros: friendly , safe and good service.
reviews.cons: rooms could have been cleaner. Found dirt and hair from previous guest so i know room was not thoroughly cleaned.

reviews.name: Demetrice
reviews.headline: Excellent and I do recommend this location to family and friends.
reviews.pros: Love there is no casino, none smoking hotel. Everything about my room is clean and functional. Staff is always friendly. Also the daily free bottles of water is a priceless selling point of why I choose this location every visit.
reviews.cons: The food at the pool area is very bad. Needs great improvement.

reviews.name: Salim
reviews.headline: Excellent stay. I would definitely stay here again.
reviews.pros: The property was very clean, comfortable, and well maintained. The staff were friendly and helpful, and the location was good
reviews.cons: Nothing. Everything was great.

reviews.name: Brenden
reviews.pros: The rooms and pool area were good
reviews.cons: The elevator was a nightmare. Waits of 20+ minutes

reviews.name: Pablo
reviews.headline: Nice hotel with pool in Vegas
reviews.pros: Pool, friendly staff
reviews.cons: Not very close to the strip

reviews.name: Candis
reviews.headline: Great location, lovely staff, short walk to Allegiant
reviews.pros: I booked for the proximity to Allegiant Stadium. It was a quick walk and saved me from the super long Uber lines. The staff was incredibly friendly and the breakfast was really good! You could walk to the strip without too much of a problem and there was a bus stop less than a block away.
reviews.cons: There was only one elevator in the hotel. During off hours it wasn't so bad, but during the last 40 minutes of breakfast the wait to go up or down was so very long.

reviews.name: Marcus
reviews.headline: Good value near T-Mobile Center
reviews.pros: Great location just a short walk from the hockey arena. Good value for money.
reviews.cons: Breakfast wasn’t great.

reviews.name: Susan
reviews.headline: Excellent stay in a hotel within walking distance of the strip and a quiet relaxing place to stay.
reviews.pros: Lovely comfy bed with everything you need for a comfortable stay in the room and great breakfast each morning. Friendly staff and hotel within walking distance of the strip.
reviews.cons: A few issues with the room, safe deposit box wouldn’t lock and couldn’t turn off the air conditioning. These were dealt with promptly.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.headline: Would stay again
reviews.pros: Friendly staff, good breakfast
reviews.cons: The pillows were awful, hotel not near strip attractions so had to use Uber every time instead of walking

reviews.name: Sylvester
reviews.headline: Good
reviews.pros: Room king size bed, the cleanliness
reviews.cons: Breakfast and paying for parking

And the pool had the smallest waves I’ve ever seen in a wave pool. It was not even fun. Our check-in was delayed…

reviews.name: Navigate37317723782
reviews.headline: Not worth going for the Mandalay Bay/ Beach area/ Pool area.
reviews.pros: Pools are cold, small, extremely crowded with children, no working hot tubs, no bubbles, one with bubbles was very small and there was no room because children were cold and stayed in the hot tub. It was filled to the brim. The lazy river only has one option for the tubes- buying them at the gift…

reviews.name: M6493JScindyb
reviews.headline: Watch out for fees
reviews.pros: Nice but quite expensive. You will need to pay extra if you want to use the mini fridge. Watch out for resort fees that are in addition to your room rate and taxes. I didn't use anything to trigger this fee and, therefore waiting for my $300 refund. It's been almost 30 days. After reaching out…

reviews.name: mattsT6064YC

reviews.pros: We paid days ahead of time for late checkout and the process to confirm checkout time was exhausting affair on our last day in Vegas souring the experience. The phone in our room did not work so we could not call the front desk. The line at the front desk was 20-40 people deep at all times. We…

reviews.name: felipelV7679QQ
reviews.headline: Everything takes a lot of time
reviews.pros: Everything takes a lot of time and cost a lot. Old room with old towels. Unauthorized charges to my room. I am sure you can fix them, but it will take 50 minutes of your day. Misleading survey.

reviews.name: S6286MPkathleenf
reviews.headline: Mandalay Bay is the worst place in Las Vegas I have ever stayed.

reviews.name: Kylee
reviews.headline: Great stay for a family staycation.
reviews.pros: Relaxing! The pool was amazing for the whole family, we had a great time. The ambiance outside at night with the fire pits was amazing.
reviews.cons: Not stroller friendly for the baby to get around. The handicap lifts were down and we had to just lift the stroller up and down stairs.

reviews.name: Tracie
reviews.headline: Overpriced for what we got
reviews.pros: The location was perfect for visiting my son who lives nearby. Easy to find and the grounds looked lovely. Bonus was valet parking because my Mom is in a wheelchair and parking is pretty far to take her.
reviews.cons: I requested an accessible room but we found that in fact, it wasn't accessible for her. There was only a bar on the left side of the toilet and she's unable to use her left hand. The shower leaked all over the bathroom floor and out into the foyer, creating a slippery surface for someone who's not…

reviews.name: Leo
reviews.headline: The dining options and the golf course are the big winners at this resort. Room, not so much.
reviews.pros: Marssa - Dinner was fantastic, and the service staff was great. Ricks - Another outstanding meal and service felt rushed. The server was a bit rough, pushy, and pressed. Location was great. Golf was memorable.
reviews.cons: The shower water temperature was barely lukewarm. Not cold but definitely not hot. The room was pretty basic. The bathroom was also very basic. The room was a bit tired and did not feel very resorty!

reviews.name: Elizabeth
reviews.headline: We really liked the facilities. Had fun and will stay again
reviews.pros: It was lovely the pool was great. The drinks were great
reviews.cons: Restaurant was WAY understaffed. People got up and left. It was sad because the staff there was working hard but wow it was pretty bad tho food was great.

reviews.name: John E Robinson
reviews.pros: The location was perfect. Loved the peace and quiet.
reviews.cons: The rooms bathroom walls needed a wipe down.

reviews.name: Julia
reviews.headline: This hotel is in need of a full makeover.
reviews.pros: The price
reviews.cons: The hotel is run down. Our room smelled like smoke. Beds were hard. The photos online do not look like the actual rooms.

reviews.name: Shuo
reviews.pros: The parking building is dirty.

reviews.name: Tracy
reviews.headline: Too many fees!
reviews.pros: First of all very excited about my price per night until I got my bill at the end of our stay! $53 resort fee charged every day! On top of that charged for moving some cans in mini bar to get our water cold! Ridiculous. That monitoring system does not work! Very sad because we had such a nice time…

reviews.name: Ian
reviews.pros: I was really impressed with Virgin Hotels Las Vegas. The property felt very modern and well-maintained, with clean grounds and stylish décor throughout. The rooms were sleek, comfortable, and thoughtfully designed definitely one of the more updated hotels off the Strip.

reviews.name: John
reviews.pros: The property was fine, but we had a handicapped person with and with construction it was a very long confusing path to get to our room. We also had a car topper on and it wouldn’t fit. We were told where to go and all where to short. It took two hours to park

reviews.name: Falicia
reviews.pros: The rooms are spacious and clean.

reviews.name: Melissa
reviews.pros: Loud rooms and security and

name: Planet Hollywood Resort & Casino
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Process in place to check health of guests
Thermometers for guests provided by property
description: Luxurious Accommodations The guest rooms at Planet Hollywood Las Vegas are a haven of comfort and style, boasting 42-inch plasma-screen TVs, spacious bathrooms, and unique movie memorabilia in each room. Dining Extravaganza Indulge in a culinary journey at the hotel's 9 on-site restaurants, including the famed BurGR by Gordon Ramsay, Strip House for classic steaks, Koi for Japanese cuisine, and Pink's Hot Dogs for American hot dog delights. Whether you crave fine dining or a casual buffet, there's something to satisfy every palate. Entertainment and Relaxation Immerse yourself in the vibrant energy of the Las Vegas Strip with 2 outdoor pools and hot tubs offering stunning views, a full-servi
importantInfo: Please note that guests may be assigned a different bed type based on availability when booking the following room type: Room Type Assigned on Arrival. Valet parking is available and subject to a parking fee. Please contact property for details. The minimum age for check-in is 21 years old. Please note that all guests need to provide a valid government-issued ID at check-in. The resort fee listed in the policy section includes the following: - In-room WiFi - Fitness centre access - In-room local/toll-free calls Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: arbrandes
reviews.headline: Had a good time, but not really worth the price. Maybe this is a Vegas thing, not an Encore thing.
reviews.pros: The hotel is, on the surface, very good. The room is great, bathroom very clean, the elevators are fast, etc. The location is also good, for Vegas. (Nothing is truly walkable in Vegas - distances are deceiving because of the size of the buildings - but there is a mall right "beside" the Encore.)
reviews.cons: They will nickel-and-dime you left and right. Open the mini bar to cool that water you brought? Charge. Pick up something from the room display just to see what it is? You bought it. 40 dollars.

reviews.name: Todd
reviews.headline: Nice place but certainly not luxury
reviews.pros: Encore is close to many fun attractions, that why I originally picked it.
reviews.cons: Sadly that was the mainly only positive thing. For a higher up-scale location, I thought I would be treated more, but at the end of the day, it’s your basic Vegas hotel, it seems. Any other place in the world, upscale luxury means celebrating your guests. We don’t get welcomed, there was not a free…

reviews.name: Pavel
reviews.headline: An amazing place
reviews.pros: Impeccable. I keep coming back every year, and it is by far the best hotel in town! The quality of everything and the attention to detail is unprecedented!
reviews.cons: The pool hours are 9AM to 5PM. I wish it could be at least 8AM to 6PM..))

reviews.name: Russ
reviews.headline: Would not go back other hotels give higher service for your money.
reviews.pros: Usual high quality for this type hotel.
reviews.cons: Do not expect anything for free but seeing as it was our wedding hotel could have made even the smallest of efforts. WiFi was not good, having to log in and out daily. Smart room controls really did not work well, and I do feel food and drink was over priced even to its sister hotel.

reviews.name: Dasia
reviews.headline: Very comfortable and relaxing
reviews.pros: The room itself was huge and the in-room tablet that controls everything? dangerously convenient. Honestly, draw a bath, throw on one of those cloud-level robes….;) Their breakfast buffet is massive and one of my favorites on the strip!
reviews.cons: The fridge in my room started humming like it was training for a marathon… and then kept leveling up until it was basically a full-blown motor concert. To their credit, the hotel sent a tech up right away and even offered to move me.

reviews.name: 25d509b78a9673b14ae0070570ab59bb
reviews.headline: Elegant higher class of people we feel comfortable with!
reviews.pros: I love the food guilting guests never too crowded when we go and we love that. Nice and Quiet around the pool restaurants are awesome! Shows are amazing!
reviews.cons: Three times we have been here I run HOT and the air conditioning doesn’t reach the bed at night! My friends said the same thing too hot at night for us! I need it cold to sleep! reviews.name: Akmaral
reviews.headline: Peaceful stay, no casino gauntlet
reviews.pros: Loved this hotel! Such a relief to walk straight to my room without having to weave through rows of slot machines and smoke. The lobby was calm, clean, and quiet. Felt like an actual hotel, not a casino with beds. Would 100% stay again just for that
reviews.cons: The only thing I didn’t like is that there’s no self parking garage. Valet parking is too pricy.

reviews.name: Jane
reviews.headline: Nice hotel, clean and comfortable
reviews.pros: Great location easy access to othern hotels and tram, comfy bed, staff friendly
reviews.cons: Don't expect anything complimentary in your room (not even complimentary tea or coffee making facility), our room had a kitchen (microwave, cooking element, sink) but all the cupboards and drawers were empty, no plates, cups, glasses, cutlery etc. There was no point having the kitchen in the room!

reviews.name: Favian
reviews.headline: Would diffentley be staying here in the future
reviews.pros: Service, view and price were great
reviews.cons: No complaints

name: Sam's Town Hotel & Gambling Hall
description: Experience the excitement of Las Vegas at Sam's Town Hotel & Gambling Hall, where fun and comfort meet in a vibrant atmosphere. Luxurious Accommodations Stay in one of our 645 spacious guestrooms, complete with Smart televisions and game consoles for endless entertainment. Each room features modern private bathrooms equipped with complimentary toiletries for your convenience. Diverse Dining Options Savor delectable American cuisine at Smokey Joe's Cafe, or choose from our 10 on-site restaurants. For those late-night cravings, room service is available during limited hours, along with refreshing drinks at our 4 bars and lounges. Entertainment and Relaxation Try your luck at our lively cas
importantInfo: Pool access available from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Up to 2 children 18 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. A car is recommended for transportation to and from this property. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

The staff at restaurants were friendly and good service. That being said we were told we could check in at 730am. We…

reviews.name: Wayne
reviews.pros: I was surprised and impressed on how beautiful the hotel is from the other side of the casino. Very eco friendly environment, friendly staff. All away from the craziness of the Las Vegas strip.

reviews.name: William
reviews.pros: As good as it get's. Very satisfied.

reviews.name: William
reviews.pros: Everything was as good as it get's.

reviews.name: Amy
reviews.pros: The Hotel was pleasant and friendly and clean. Their should be added discounts for hotel stay guests with the other amenities ( i. e. bowling, movies, etc).

reviews.name: Richard Vincent
reviews.pros: Dining choices from fast food to steak dinners. Abundant parking and close to other shopping.
